changes.description: Brookfield BII Dec 31, 2025 historical AUM corrected: $4,787M (N-CSR) → $5,015.9M per NPORT-P filed 2026-02-27 (CIK 1955857, acc 0002071691-26-005312). Per task rules: NPORT-P (totAssets - totLiabs) used for AUM. No new NAV filings found for any fund.

ISQ OpenInfra Feb 2026 NAV $32.40/share, AUM $207M (SEC 8-K EX-99.1 filed 2026-04-02, CIK 2059924). Brookfield Dec 2025 AUM updated to $5,016M per NPORT-P (CIK 1955857). All 7 funds verified against latest SEC filings.
KKR Infrastructure Conglomerate declared Q1 2026 distribution: $0.33/share (Class I), payable Apr 27, 2026. (SEC 8-K Item 8.01 filed 2026-04-01, CIK 1948056)
Ares ACI increased revolving credit facility from $50M to $200M via ACI Portfolio Aggregator SPV LLC. (SEC 8-K Item 2.03 filed 2026-03-31, CIK 2031750)
Stonepeak-Plus sold units for $69.9M in March 2026 closing. SP+ INFRA cumulative capital raised: $1,192M since May 2025 inception. (SEC 8-K Item 3.02 filed 2026-03-31, CIK 2045458)
Ares ACI sold $354.1M common shares in March 2026 monthly closing (12.4M Class I + 1.8M Class S shares at Feb 28 NAV $24.9252). (SEC 8-K Item 3.02 filed 2026-03-23, CIK 2031750)
Brookfield BII filed N-CSR annual report for FY2025 (Dec 31, 2025). Audited Class I NAV $10.89/share confirmed. Total net assets $5,016M per NPORT-P. (CIK 1955857)

Full SEC historical backfill: Ares ACI now has 15 monthly data points (Nov 2024 - Feb 2026), KKR Infra Conglomerate has 31 monthly data points (Aug 2023 - Feb 2026). Added 6m, 1y, YTD returns calculations.
